title: Dial ReferHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the dial referHook when a SIP REFER is received during an active dial. The response can contain new verbs to execute.

refer_details.description: Details of the SIP REFER request. Any custom X-* headers on the REFER are also included as snake_cased properties (e.g. X-Override-Number becomes x_override_number).

refer_to_user.description: User part of the Refer-To URI (phone number or SIP user).

sip_referred_by.description: SIP Referred-By header value, if present.

referred_by_user.description: User part of the Referred-By URI, if present.

sip_user_agent.description: User-Agent header from the REFER request.

referring_call_sid.description: Call SID of the leg that sent the REFER.

referred_call_sid.description: Call SID of the leg being referred.
